<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="diag-state" name="Diagnostics Client State Machine"> <mxGraphModel dx="-430" dy="-87" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="300" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Diagnostics Client State Machine" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="10" width="500" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="connected" value="CONNECTED" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="70" width="110" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reading" value="READING
LINE" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="190" y="70" width="110" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="parsing" value="PARSING" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="350" y="70" width="110" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="executing" value="EXECUTING" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="510" y="70" width="110" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="writing" value="WRITING
RESPONSE" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="670" y="70" width="110" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="disconnected" value="DISCONNECTED" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="510" y="210" width="130" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1" style="strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="connected" target="reading" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" style="strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="reading" target="parsing" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2l" value="newline" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="t2" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" style="strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="parsing" target="executing" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3l" value="valid cmd" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#d6b656;" parent="t3" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4" style="strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;" parent="1" source="executing" target="writing" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4l" value="result" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#d79b00;" parent="t4" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;flowAnimation=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" parent="1" source="writing" target="reading" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="725" y="50" /> <mxPoint x="245" y="50" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t5l" value="next command" style="edgeLabel;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#82b366;" parent="t5" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="td1" style="strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="reading" target="disconnected" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="td2" style="strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;" parent="1" source="writing" target="disconnected" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="td_l" value="client disconnect" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#b85450;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="190" width="100" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
